titleStmt.title: SII 34.211: original edition by Y. Subbarayalu
No. 211. Sembāṭṭūr, Alangudi Taluk, Pudukkottai District. On the south wall of the central shrine in the Tiruvāruḍaiyār temple.

summary.p: Pāṇḍya, Jaṭāvarman Sundarapāṇḍya, 4th year = c. 13th-14th Century.

The ūrār of three villages, namely Chembāḍu, Kōraikkurichchi and Puttāmbūr in Kuḷamaṅgala-nāḍu a unit of Jayasiṅgakulakāla-vaḷanāḍu assigned some land in each of their villages for the maintenance of a tank in Chembāḍu. The accountant of the nāḍu was to supervise the measurements of the desilting pits in the tank.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svastiśrī kOṟccaṭa paṉma
rāṉa tirupuvaṉac cakkaravat
tikaḷ śrīcuntarapāṇṭiya tēva
ṟku yāṇṭu nāllāvatu ceyaciṅka kulakā
lavaḷanāṭṭu kuḷamaṅkala nāṭṭu cem
pāṭṭu Ūravarum kōraikkuṟucci A
raiyakaḷum puttāmpūr Araiyakaḷum
cempāṭṭu kuḷattukku kuḷappaṭṭiyāka vi
ṭṭa cempāṭṭukku viṭṭa nākaṉ vayalum
Araiyaṉ vayalum Āka nilam 1kāṇi m kōraik
kuṟuccikku viṭṭa ciṟuvayalum cātti vaya
lum kucavaṉ paṟikālum Āka nilam 2 mā m put
tāmpūrkku viṭṭa kālcceyyum vē
ṭṭaippēṟum viraicceyyum paṟikkā
lum virāccilai vayalum Āka nilam 4ṇu�
viṭṭa taṭi 5 ṉāl � 1 kāṇi Āka � 1 mā � Iṉ
ṉilam mākāṇiyum Āṇṭākaḷ vē
ṇṭiṉakuṭikku Aṭaiccu kaṇkāṇit
tu mēl vāramum kuḷattillē kuḻi veṭṭi
nāṭṭu kaṇakku Eṟikuḻi Aḷantu kuṭuttu Itukku
Ēṟṟa curukkam coṉṉār Uṇṭākil ce
ttum keṭṭu nilai niṟuttikoḷḷa kaṭavarkaḷ §
Digital edition of SII 34.211 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
